channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI velocity audit: 3 real metrics your team ignores
item.description: In a 2025 study by Sema, teams using AI assistants saw a 22% increase in code smells per 1K lines of code, even as PR throughput rose.

item.title: AI code’s hidden CVEs exposed
item.description: Cut security incidents 60% by scanning AI-generated code for 7 hidden risks before they hit prod

item.title: Negotiate remote pay from low-cost cities
item.description: Raise remote salary 33–100% from lower-cost countries — exact templates, payment rails, and dashboards that clients actually approve

item.title: Build dev platform for $2k/month
item.description: Cut dev platform costs 77% to $412/month with ephemeral environments, Pulumi, and Next.js ISR — connection-first design for mobile networks in Africa

item.title: Africa devs: Ship production code, not CRUD
item.description: Show production-grade engineering in your remote portfolio to get hired from Africa — metrics, post-mortems, and Terraform matter more than React dashboards. 2026 hiring data included.

item.title: AI skills that pay: data vs prompt skills in 2026
item.description: AI skills that pay 22% more in 2026 — prompt vs data engineering, with real benchmarks, salaries, and the one change that cuts costs 70%

item.title: RAG in prod: why demos crumble
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 88% and cloud bill 83% by splitting retrieval and generation. Real numbers, Go + pgvector 0.7.0, Redis 7.2, vLLM 0.5.0-alpha — what the tutorials skip.

item.title: Why 48 connections can break your DB
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by shrinking the database connection pool — the real levers most teams ignore in 2026

item.title: Drop EC2 bills 70% without code
item.description: Cut EC2 costs 70% with one sysctl tweak — TCP BBR, zswap, gp3 IOPS, and the exact commands for Amazon Linux 2023 and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS.

item.title: CircleCI still beats GitHub Actions at 50k builds
item.description: CircleCI beats GitHub Actions at 50k builds/month by 75% — with real cost breakdowns, hidden fees, and Nairobi fintech case studies from 2026.

item.title: Choose no-code only when
item.description: Choose no-code vs custom code in 2026 with this decision framework: latency SLOs, export limits, GDPR, and real cost data. Save weeks of rewrite pain.

item.title: AI skills: 2 salaries that move in 2026
item.description: Salaries in 2026 move 30% when engineers master prompt + chaining vs RAG pipelines — latency, cost, and MTTR numbers that recruiters actually read

item.title: Mis-size DB pool? Here’s why
item.description: Cut database connection pool mistakes 80%: stop using CPU × 2 — use the formula with real latency data and PgBouncer for 2026 systems

item.title: Hire remotely from Africa: show context, not code
item.description: In 2026, GitHub portfolios fail remote African devs — here’s how 3 engineers landed jobs with problem-first projects, production artifacts, and relevance scoring. Includes AWS services, specific tools, and actionable steps.

item.title: 50k builds: GitHub vs CircleCI cost smackdown
item.description: CircleCI beats GitHub Actions 2-to-1 at 50k builds/month — real cost data, benchmarks, and the pricing change that broke the old advice.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 4 silent prod killers
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency from 280ms to 35ms and monthly costs from $980 to $620 by moving vector search out of PostgreSQL 16 into Milvus 2.4.3 with Caffeine cache.

item.title: Price your remote job like a New York dev
item.description: Price your remote salary like a New York dev — $120k target, $112/hr client rate, 6% rejection drop. FX locks, VAT gotchas, and the 48-hour rule most freelancers miss.

item.title: Claude code review: wins and blind spots
item.description: AI code review with Claude saves 150 hours/month but misses race conditions and logic bugs. Setup, costs, and where it fails in 2026.

item.title: RAG pipelines: 3 untold prod traps
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 76% and save $1,380/month — the hidden costs tutorials ignore: connection churn, cache semantics, and prompt overhead. Real numbers from a 2,000 QPS Jakarta startup.

item.title: Wrong DB pool size wastes cash
item.description: Waste 60% of database budget on idle connections — pool size formulas from 2018 break in 2026. Measure rps, latency, and lock waits to cut costs 30% today.
